items.title: iptv-org/iptv
items.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world
items.author: iptv-org
items.summary_zh: 这个项目收集了全球各地公开可用的IPTV频道，让你能轻松观看来自世界各国的电视节目。对于热爱探索不同文化节目或身处海外想收看家乡频道的人来说，它提供了一个免费且便捷的聚合入口，无需繁琐的订阅流程。重要的是，它完全开源并由社区维护，频道列表会持续更新，有效解决了寻找稳定免费IPTV源的常见痛点。
items.summary_en: iptv-org/iptv is a community-maintained collection of freely available IPTV channels from around the world. It aggregates thousands of live TV streams into a single, structured playlist, making it easy to explore international TV content without expensive subscriptions. This open-source project solves the headache of finding reliable, free IPTV sources by keeping the list constantly updated. Anyone interested in global TV content—from expats to cord-cutters—can benefit by simply loading the playlist into any compatible player.

items.title: VoltAgent/awesome-design-md
items.description: A collection of DESIGN.md files analysis by popular brand design systems. Drop one into your project and let coding agents generate a matching UI.
items.author: VoltAgent
items.summary_zh: VoltAgent 在 GitHub 上开源了一个叫 awesome-design-md 的项目，收集了各大品牌设计系统的 DESIGN.md 文件，比如苹果、谷歌等。你只要把这个文件放到自己的项目里，AI 编码代理就能读它，然后自动生成和品牌风格完全匹配的 UI 界面，省去了手动调样式的时间。对前端开发者或依赖 AI 生成界面的团队特别有用，能保证设计一致性。
items.summary_en: VoltAgent has launched an open-source collection called awesome-design-md on GitHub, which aggregates DESIGN.md files from popular brand design systems like Apple and Google. By dropping one of these files into your project, AI coding agents can read it and automatically generate UI components that match the brand's exact style guidelines. This eliminates manual style tweaking and ensures design consistency, making it a valuable resource for frontend developers and teams relying on AI-generated interfaces.

items.title: addyosmani/agent-skills
items.description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.
items.author: addyosmani
items.summary_zh: agent-skills 是 Google Chrome 团队 Addy Osmani 发起的开源项目，旨在为AI编码代理注入生产级的工程技能。项目提供了一套精心设计的技能库，涵盖代码审查、调试、测试生成、性能优化、安全审计等专业领域。每个技能以清晰的提示（prompt）和示例形式呈现，使AI代理能像资深工程师一样思考和工作。该项目的重要性在于填补了当前AI编码助手的核心短板——多数工具只能生成代码片段，但缺乏对代码质量、可维护性和工程规范的深层次理解。受益对象是所有使用AI辅助编程的开发者，尤其是团队中的高级工程师和架构师。GitHub趋势榜上的高关注度反映了开发者对“更有用AI代理”的迫切需求。项目本身是纯文本/知识库形式，依赖LLM本身的推理能力，不绑定特定平台，因此极易集成到Cline、GitHub Copilot等工具中。
items.summary_en: Agent-skills is an open-source project by Google Chrome's Addy Osmani that equips AI coding agents with production-grade engineering competencies. It provides a curated library of skills—code review, debugging, test generation, performance optimization, and security auditing—each packaged as well-crafted prompts with real-world examples. The project addresses a critical gap in current AI coding assistants: most can generate code but lack deep understanding of quality, maintainability, and engineering best practices. Senior developers, teams adopting AI-assisted workflows, and tool builders benefit directly from these reusable skill definitions. Its rapid rise on GitHub signals urgent demand for more capable, context-aware AI agents. The project is platform-agnostic (pure text/prompt libraries) and integrates easily with agents like Cline, Claude Code, or Copilot. By codifying expert knowledge into prompt templates, it pushes AI coding from toy examples toward production readiness.

items.title: 一夜之间，GPT-5.6 来了，Codex 没了，Claude 急了
items.summary_zh: AI 领域在短短一夜之间发生了巨变：OpenAI 突然放出了 GPT-5.6，性能大幅提升，但同时宣布停用 Codex，这个曾为开发者熟知的代码生成工具。另一边，Anthropic 的 Claude 因为新模型压力倍增，似乎不得不加快迭代步伐来应对竞争。整个行业节奏快得让人应接不暇，开发者需要迅速适应新工具。
items.summary_en: The AI landscape shifted overnight: OpenAI released GPT-5.6 with significant performance gains, yet simultaneously discontinued Codex, the well-known code generation tool. Meanwhile, Anthropic's Claude faces mounting pressure from the new release, likely forcing faster iterations to stay competitive. This rapid evolution demands developers quickly adapt to new tools, highlighting the breakneck pace of AI model competition.

items.title: unclecode/crawl4ai
items.description: 🚀🤖 Crawl4AI: Open-source LLM Friendly Web Crawler & Scraper. Don't be shy, join here: https://discord.gg/jP8KfhDhyN
items.author: unclecode
items.summary_zh: Crawl4AI 是一个为大型语言模型量身打造的开源网络爬虫工具，能高效抓取网页内容并整理成 AI 友好的格式。相比通用爬虫，它特别优化了数据清洗和结构化输出，让开发者可以直接用抓到的数据训练或测试语言模型。无论是收集训练集还是构建知识库，这个工具都能省下大量预处理时间。
items.summary_en: Crawl4AI is an open-source web crawler designed specifically for large language models, efficiently scraping web content and formatting it into AI-friendly structures. Unlike general-purpose scrapers, it excels at data cleaning and structured output, allowing developers to directly use the fetched data for training or testing language models. Whether you're building a training dataset or a knowledge base, this tool saves significant preprocessing time.

items.title: ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
items.description: LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。 LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs.
items.author: ZhuLinsen
items.summary_zh: 这是一个由大语言模型驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统，它不仅能整合多源行情数据和实时新闻，还提供决策看板与自动推送功能，支持零成本定时运行。对于普通投资者来说，这个系统相当于一个24小时不休的私人分析助手，能够从海量信息中提炼出关键信号并推送到手机上，让决策更高效。
items.summary_en: This is an LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system that fuses diverse market data sources with real-time news into a unified dashboard. It offers automated push notifications and can run on a zero-cost scheduled basis, making it a practical, always-on assistant for investors. By distilling massive information into actionable signals, it helps users make faster, more informed trading decisions.

items.title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
items.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
items.author: asgeirtj
items.summary_zh: 这个GitHub仓库公开了从Anthropic和OpenAI等AI公司模型中提取的系统提示（system prompts），包括Claude Fable 5、Opus 4.8、ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking等版本。这些提示揭示了模型背后的一些行为规则和设计逻辑，对AI研究者和开发者理解模型内部机制、进行提示工程非常有价值，但也引发了关于安全和隐私的讨论。
items.summary_en: This repository contains extracted system prompts from major AI models including Anthropic's Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, and OpenAI's ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking and GPT 5.5 Instant. These leaked prompts provide rare insight into how these models are instructed to behave, revealing design logic and safety rules. For AI researchers and prompt engineers, this is a goldmine for understanding and improving prompt techniques. However, it also raises concerns about intellectual property and security, as companies typically keep such system prompts confidential.

items.title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
items.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
items.author: asgeirtj
items.summary_zh: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks 是一个 GitHub 项目，它收集了 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 多个大模型的系统提示词，包括 Claude Fable 5、Opus 4.8、ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking 等。这些提示词揭示了模型背后如何被引导、如何设定角色和限制，对 AI 研究者和开发者理解模型行为非常有价值。它引发了关于提示工程和模型安全边界的讨论，也是窥探顶级 AI 内部设计的一个窗口。
items.summary_en: This GitHub repository compiles leaked system prompts from popular AI models like Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and Opus 4.8, as well as OpenAI's ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking and GPT 5.5 Instant. By exposing the hidden instructions that shape how these models behave, it offers rare insight into prompt engineering, safety guardrails, and role-setting techniques. AI researchers and developers can learn how top models are orchestrated, but the leak also raises important questions about access control and intellectual property in the generative AI race.

items.title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
items.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
items.author: Panniantong
items.summary_zh: Agent-Reach是一个命令行工具，让AI代理能够直接“看到”整个互联网。它支持读取和搜索Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小红书等主流平台，而且不需要任何API费用。对于开发AI代理的人来说，最大的痛点就是如何让代理获取实时、跨平台的信息，这款工具通过简单的CLI命令就解决了这个问题。无论是做社交媒体分析、技术趋势追踪还是内容聚合，开发者都可以零成本地为自己的AI装上“眼睛”。
items.summary_en: Agent-Reach is a CLI tool that gives AI agents the ability to 'see' the entire internet. It enables reading and searching across major platforms like Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, and Xiaohongshu — all without any API fees. The biggest pain point for AI agent developers is getting real-time, cross-platform data; Agent-Reach solves this with a single command. Whether you're building a social media analyzer, a tech trend tracker, or a content aggregator, you can now equip your AI with 'eyes' at zero cost. It's a game-changer for hobbyists and startups who previously had to rely on expensive or rate-limited APIs.

items.title: apple/container
items.description: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.
items.author: apple
items.summary_zh: 苹果官方开源了一个名为container的工具，它利用轻量级虚拟机在Mac上创建和管理Linux容器。整个工具用Swift编写并针对Apple Silicon深度优化，为macOS开发者提供了一种原生、高效且安全的容器运行方案，填补了Apple生态中本地Linux容器体验的空白。
items.summary_en: Apple has open-sourced container, a tool that creates and manages Linux containers on Mac using lightweight virtual machines. Written in Swift and optimized for Apple Silicon, it delivers a native, fast, and secure container experience on macOS. This project fills a long-standing gap for developers who need Linux containers without leaving the Apple ecosystem.

items.title: anthropics/claude-cookbooks
items.description: A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.
items.author: anthropics
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 官方在 GitHub 上发布了 Claude 菜谱合集，里面包含一系列 Jupyter 笔记和实用示例，展示了如何用 Claude 做文本分析、代码生成、多轮对话等高级任务。这些菜谱不仅教基础用法，还挖掘了很多创意场景，比如用 Claude 写剧本或模拟辩论。对于想深入研究 Claude 能力的开发者来说，这是绝佳的学习资源。
items.summary_en: Anthropic has officially released the Claude Cookbooks on GitHub, a collection of Jupyter notebooks and practical recipes that demonstrate advanced use cases like text analysis, code generation, and multi-turn conversations. Beyond basic tutorials, these cookbooks explore creative scenarios such as scriptwriting or debate simulation. For developers looking to push Claude's capabilities, this is an invaluable learning resource.

items.title: 8点1氪丨老乡鸡五年五次冲击上市失败；两款燃油车重回销量榜前十；长鑫科技披露招股意向书，预计7月16日发行
items.summary_zh: 8点1氪早报带来三条重要商业动态：老乡鸡第五次冲刺上市再次失败，前四次已折戟，这次依然未果；燃油车市场出现回暖迹象，两款老车型重回销量榜前十，令新能源车企感到压力；长鑫科技披露招股意向书，计划在7月16日发行，这家内存芯片巨头离A股上市又近一步。
items.summary_en: The 8am News briefs three key business updates: Laoxiangji failed its IPO attempt for the fifth time in five years, marking another setback for the fast-food chain; two old gasoline car models returned to the top ten sales list, signaling a resurgence in traditional auto demand that pressures EV makers; Changxin Memory Technologies released its prospectus, targeting a July 16 issuance, bringing the DRAM giant closer to its A-share listing.

items.title: GPT-5.6全量放送，Codex正式并入ChatGPT
items.summary_zh: OpenAI正式发布GPT-5.6，并宣布将Codex编程助手完全整合进ChatGPT。这一更新意味着用户无需再切换工具即可在ChatGPT中完成代码生成、调试与解释，大幅提升开发效率。对于经常需要编程帮助的开发者、数据科学家和学习者来说，GPT-5.6的到来让AI辅助编程更加无缝和强大。
items.summary_en: OpenAI has officially released GPT-5.6 and announced the full integration of Codex, its coding assistant, into ChatGPT. This means users can now generate, debug, and explain code directly within ChatGPT without switching tools, greatly improving developer productivity. For developers, data scientists, and learners who frequently need programming help, GPT-5.6 makes AI-assisted coding more seamless and powerful than ever.

items.title: 智算中心的20%利用率困局怎么破？润建股份Token（词元）工厂给出了新解法
items.summary_zh: 国内智算中心普遍面临利用率仅20%的困境，大量算力资源被闲置。润建股份提出“Token工厂”模式，通过将算力资源以Token形式灵活调度和共享，有效提升利用率。这一方案让中小企业和开发者能以更低成本获取算力，同时帮助数据中心运营商盘活资产，为AI训练和推理提供更高效的资源分配。
items.summary_en: Many AI computing centers in China are stuck with a utilization rate of only 20%, wasting massive computing resources. Runjian shares have proposed a 'Token Factory' model that dynamically schedules and shares computing power in the form of tokens, significantly boosting utilization. This solution allows smaller companies and developers to access computing at lower cost while helping data center operators better monetize their assets, offering a more efficient resource allocation for AI training and inference.

items.title: 揭秘Momenta：马斯克式CEO、AI执念和量产机器丨深氪
items.summary_zh: 这篇深度报道揭示了自动驾驶公司Momenta的内部故事：其CEO深受马斯克风格影响，执着于AI技术路线，并全力推动量产落地。Momenta通过“数据驱动+量产闭环”的策略，在自动驾驶领域快速成长，成为行业重要玩家。文章适合对自动驾驶技术发展趋势和创业公司管理哲学感兴趣的读者。
items.summary_en: This in-depth report unveils the inside story of autonomous driving company Momenta: its CEO is strongly influenced by Elon Musk's style, holds a deep obsession with AI, and pushes hard for mass production. By adopting a 'data-driven and mass-production closed loop' strategy, Momenta has grown rapidly and become a key player in autonomous driving. It is a must-read for those interested in the trends of self-driving technology and the management philosophy of AI startups.

items.title: 刚刚，GPT-5.6「太阳系」全家桶上线，Codex消失了
items.summary_zh: OpenAI重磅推出GPT-5.6系列，代号“太阳系”，包括多个子模型组成的全家桶。同时，此前独立的Codex编程工具被完全融入ChatGPT，不再单独存在。这一变化让ChatGPT变成一个更强大的全能助手，尤其对编程、数据分析等场景带来质的提升。开发者可以直接在对话中完成复杂代码任务，标志着AI集成度再次跃升。
items.summary_en: OpenAI has just launched GPT-5.6 under the codename 'Solar System', a family of models including several sub-models. Notably, the previously standalone Codex coding tool has been fully absorbed into ChatGPT and no longer exists separately. This transformation makes ChatGPT an even more powerful all-in-one assistant, especially for coding and data analysis. Developers can now complete complex coding tasks directly in conversations, marking another leap in AI integration.

items.title: 华为天才少年与DeepSeek冲突背后，梁文锋的人才观是什么？
items.summary_zh: 文章探讨了华为“天才少年”计划成员与AI公司DeepSeek之间发生的冲突，并深入分析了DeepSeek创始人梁文锋的独特人才观。梁文锋强调“极客精神”和“独立思考”，与华为体系产生碰撞。这场争论折射出中国AI行业在人才培养与使用上的不同路径，对关注科技行业人才管理和创新文化的读者有启发意义。
items.summary_en: This article explores a conflict between members of Huawei's 'Genius Youth' program and AI company DeepSeek, then dives into DeepSeek founder Liang Wenfeng's distinctive views on talent. Liang emphasizes 'geek spirit' and independent thinking, which clashes with Huawei's system. The debate reflects different approaches to talent cultivation and utilization in China's AI industry, offering valuable insights for those interested in tech talent management and innovation culture.

items.title: 小扎深夜亮王牌，Meta烧出白菜价模型，掀翻Grok 4.5
items.summary_zh: 深夜，扎克伯格突然亮出王牌，Meta用极低成本训练出性能强劲的AI模型，直接对标并超越了Grok 4.5。这一举动不仅展示了Meta在AI领域的惊人效率，更可能改变大模型市场的价格格局，让开发者和企业都能用上白菜价的高性能模型。
items.summary_en: Late at night, Zuckerberg dropped a bombshell as Meta unveiled a remarkably cost-efficient AI model that rivals and even surpasses Grok 4.5. By achieving top-tier performance at a fraction of the usual training cost, Meta not only showcases its AI prowess but also threatens to upend the pricing dynamics of large language models. This development promises to make high-performance AI accessible to developers and businesses alike, potentially driving a wave of innovation at lower cost.

items.title: 老登自救指南
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章提供了一份实用的“老登自救指南”，针对那些感觉自己跟不上时代节奏的人。它从心态调整、技能更新到工具使用，给出了具体可操作的建议，帮助人们在技术浪潮中重新找回掌控感，实现个人成长与突破。
items.summary_en: This piece offers a practical "Old Timer's Self-Help Guide" for those who feel left behind by rapid technological changes. It provides actionable advice on mindset shifts, skill upgrades, and digital tool adoption, helping readers regain a sense of control and achieve personal growth in an ever-evolving world.

items.title: Model Y会是特斯拉最后一款车吗？
items.summary_zh: 随着特斯拉Model Y销量火爆，外界开始猜测这款车会不会是特斯拉的收官之作。文章深入分析了特斯拉的产品路线图和马斯克的愿景，讨论Model Y是否真的会成为最后一款传统意义上的车型，以及特斯拉未来可能转向无人驾驶或机器人出行服务的可能性。
items.summary_en: As the Tesla Model Y continues to dominate sales, speculation arises whether it could be Tesla's final traditional car model. The article delves into Tesla's product roadmap and Elon Musk's vision, examining if the Model Y marks the end of conventional vehicle launches and if the company will pivot entirely toward autonomous driving and robotaxi services.

items.title: 将平台开发从项目转向产品
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了如何将平台开发从传统的项目交付模式转变为持续运营的产品模式。它强调团队需要像对待产品一样对待平台，持续迭代、关注用户体验和价值交付，而非仅按项目截止日期交付功能。这种转变能够提升平台的长期健康度和业务适应性。
items.summary_en: This article explores the transformation of platform development from a project-based delivery model to a product-oriented approach. It argues that teams should treat their platform as a product, focusing on continuous iteration, user experience, and value delivery rather than simply meeting project deadlines. This shift leads to long-term platform health and better alignment with business needs.

items.title: Claude“脑内小剧场”首曝光：隐藏工作空间自发涌现类人意识，谷歌DeepMind权威认证！
items.summary_zh: 最近一项研究首次曝光了Claude模型内部的“脑内小剧场”——其隐藏工作空间自发涌现出类似人类意识的模式。谷歌DeepMind为这一发现提供了权威认证，引发学界对AI意识涌现的热议。这一发现不仅挑战了现有AI理论，还可能导致对模型安全性和可解释性的重新思考。
items.summary_en: Recent research reveals a fascinating phenomenon inside the Claude AI model: its hidden workspace spontaneously exhibits patterns resembling human consciousness, akin to an "internal theater." Google DeepMind has officially validated this discovery, sparking intense debate about emergent AI consciousness. The finding challenges current AI theories and could reshape how we approach model safety and interpretability.

items.title: 主权云争议持续，Cycle 推出欧盟专属控制平面
items.summary_zh: 随着主权云争议愈演愈烈，Cycle公司推出了专为欧盟设计的控制平面，旨在帮助企业在严格遵守数据主权法规的前提下，依然能享受灵活的云管理体验。这一举措不仅回应了欧盟对数据本地化的严格要求，也为跨国企业提供了一种在合规与效率之间取得平衡的新思路，对于那些在欧盟运营并担忧数据跨境问题的组织来说尤为重要。
items.summary_en: Amid ongoing debates over sovereign cloud requirements, Cycle has launched a dedicated control plane for the European Union. This solution allows enterprises to manage their cloud infrastructure while fully complying with EU data sovereignty regulations. By offering localized control without sacrificing flexibility, Cycle addresses a critical pain point for multinational organizations operating in Europe, enabling them to navigate complex compliance landscapes more effectively.

items.title: Claude 在 Foundry 上正式可用，但欧洲企业无法部署
items.summary_zh: Anthropic的Claude模型已在Foundry平台上正式上线，然而欧洲企业却因部署限制而无法使用这一强大工具。这反映出AI服务在全球扩展过程中面临的监管与合规挑战，尤其是欧盟在数据保护和人工智能法案方面的严格要求。对于渴望利用先进AI能力的欧洲开发者和企业来说，这一限制无疑令人失望，也促使业界思考如何在创新与合规之间找到更优的解决方案。
items.summary_en: Claude, Anthropic's advanced AI model, is now available on the Foundry platform, but European enterprises find themselves unable to deploy it due to regulatory restrictions. This highlights the growing tension between AI innovation and regional compliance, particularly with the EU's stringent data protection and AI Act requirements. The limitation frustrates European developers eager to leverage cutting-edge AI, prompting discussions on how to bridge the gap between global AI availability and local legal frameworks.

items.title: Agent 进化论：从对话到协作
items.summary_zh: 智能体（Agent）正在经历一场进化，从最初的简单对话交互走向多智能体之间的深度协作。这一转变意味着AI不再只是被动应答，而是能够主动理解任务、拆解目标，并与其他Agent协同工作以完成复杂流程。对于企业而言，这种协作能力将极大提升自动化水平，尤其适用于需要多个系统或角色配合的场景，如供应链管理、客户服务闭环等。
items.summary_en: AI agents are evolving from mere conversational interfaces into collaborative entities capable of working together to achieve complex goals. This shift enables agents to understand tasks, break them down, and coordinate with other agents, moving beyond simple Q&A to orchestrate multi-step workflows. For businesses, this means higher automation potential in areas like supply chain management and customer service, where multiple systems and roles must interact seamlessly. The trend signals a future where AI becomes a true team player rather than a solitary tool.

items.title: MCP 推出企业统一授权功能
items.summary_zh: MCP（Model Context Protocol）推出了企业统一授权功能，为组织提供了一种集中管理AI模型权限的标准方式。这一功能解决了企业在部署多个AI模型时面临的权限碎片化问题，允许管理员统一设置谁可以访问哪些模型、在什么上下文中使用。对于已经或即将大规模采用AI的企业来说，这是迈向安全、合规AI治理的关键一步，尤其受到金融、医疗等严格监管行业的关注。
items.summary_en: MCP (Model Context Protocol) has introduced an enterprise-wide unified authorization feature, enabling organizations to centrally manage permissions for AI models. This solves the fragmentation problem that arises when multiple AI models are deployed across different teams and applications. IT administrators can now enforce consistent access controls, specifying who can use which models and under what conditions. For enterprises in regulated industries like finance and healthcare, this is a crucial step toward secure and compliant AI governance, reducing risk while simplifying management.

items.title: 百万上下文下的 DeepSeek V4：SGLang 推理优化实战｜AICon深圳
items.summary_zh: 在AICon深圳大会上，技术团队分享了如何利用SGLang推理框架对DeepSeek V4进行优化，使其能够高效处理百万级别的上下文长度。这一突破意味着大模型可以一次性消化海量信息，比如整本书或长对话记录，而不需要分块处理。对于需要长文档分析、复杂推理或记忆密集型应用的用户来说，这将大幅提升性能和体验，同时也展示了开源推理工具在应对超长序列时的潜力。
items.summary_en: At AICon Shenzhen, engineers demonstrated how SGLang, an inference optimization framework, enables DeepSeek V4 to efficiently handle contexts up to one million tokens. This breakthrough allows the large language model to process entire books or lengthy conversations in one pass, eliminating the need for chunking. For users engaged in long-document analysis, complex reasoning, or memory-intensive tasks, this means better performance and more coherent responses. The achievement also underscores the growing power of open-source inference tools in pushing the boundaries of what LLMs can do with extended contexts.

items.title: Snowflake CoWork：每位知识工作者的专属工作 Agent ｜ 技术趋势
items.summary_zh: Snowflake CoWork是一款专为知识工作者设计的智能工作代理，它利用大语言模型和自动化技术，帮助用户处理文档、数据分析和协作任务。其核心价值在于将重复性工作自动化，让知识工作者能专注于更具创造性的决策。对于数据分析师、产品经理和科研人员而言，CoWork就像一位随时待命的数字助手，显著提升工作效率。
items.summary_en: Snowflake CoWork is a dedicated AI agent tailored for knowledge workers, designed to automate complex workflows involving documents, data analysis, and collaboration. By leveraging large language models, it handles repetitive tasks and provides intelligent assistance, allowing professionals to focus on high-level decisions. This tool is a game-changer for analysts, product managers, and researchers who constantly juggle multiple data sources and documents. Its significance lies in reducing cognitive load and accelerating routine processes, making it a natural evolution of productivity tools in the age of AI.

items.title: 首个具身视频基模开源！LingBot-Video 如何为“机器人大脑”构建物理引擎？
items.summary_zh: LingBot-Video作为首个开源的具身视频基础模型，从海量视频中学习物理规律与物体交互，为机器人提供感知和行动的“物理引擎”。它解决了机器人理解真实世界动态的难题，让机器人在未知环境中更自主地操作。开源发布意味着研究者和开发者可以在此基础上快速构建智能机器人应用，推动具身智能从实验室走向实际场景。
items.summary_en: LingBot-Video is the first open-source foundation model for embodied video understanding, acting as a physics engine for robotic brains. It learns physical rules and object interactions from large-scale videos, enabling robots to perceive and act in real-world environments. This breakthrough addresses the challenge of enabling robots to grasp dynamic scenes without explicit programming. By being open-sourced, it lowers the barrier for robotics researchers and developers, accelerating the deployment of autonomous systems in manufacturing, service, and home robotics.

items.title: 重磅发布 Cortex Sense：为未建模数据注入可信上下文 ｜ 技术趋势
items.summary_zh: Cortex Sense是一项突破性技术，能为未建模或非结构化数据注入可信的上下文信息。传统AI在处理从未见过的数据时往往缺乏可靠性，而Cortex Sense通过动态构建知识图谱和置信度评估，让系统在未知场景中依然能做出合理判断。这对金融风控、医疗诊断和工业质检等需要处理海量异构数据的领域至关重要，大幅提升了AI的实用性和安全边界。
items.summary_en: Cortex Sense introduces a novel approach to infuse trusted context into unmodeled and unstructured data, solving a long-standing limitation of traditional AI systems that struggle with novel inputs. By dynamically building knowledge graphs and calibrating confidence scores, it enables AI to make reliable decisions even in unfamiliar scenarios. This technology is particularly valuable for industries like finance, healthcare, and manufacturing, where data is diverse and unpredictable. It marks a significant step toward more trustworthy and adaptable AI, reducing the gap between controlled training environments and real-world deployment.

items.title: Decoding the obfuscated bash script on a Uniqlo t-shirt
items.author: speerer
items.summary_zh: 一位技术爱好者解析了优衣库T恤上印制的混淆bash脚本，发现它实际上是一个恶作剧程序，通过复杂的字符串操作和陷阱逻辑来隐藏其真实功能。这篇分析展示了逆向工程乐趣，也提醒大家即使看似无害的代码也可能暗藏玄机。对于安全研究人员和编程爱好者来说，这是一次趣味与技术并重的解谜之旅。
items.summary_en: A tech enthusiast meticulously dissected an obfuscated bash script printed on a Uniqlo t-shirt, revealing it to be a playful prank program designed to confuse casual observers. The script uses intricate string manipulations and trap commands to mask its true purpose, which is simply to echo a message. This analysis highlights the fun side of reverse engineering and serves as a reminder that even innocuous-looking code can contain hidden complexity. It's a delightful read for security researchers and programming hobbyists who enjoy a good puzzle.

items.title: John Deere owners will get the right to repair equipment under FTC settlement
items.author: djoldman
items.summary_zh: 美国联邦贸易委员会与约翰迪尔达成和解，农户将获得自主维修农用设备的合法权利。此前约翰迪尔通过软件锁定和专有部件限制第三方维修，导致维修成本高昂。这一和解打破了设备制造商的垄断，赋予农民和独立维修店使用诊断工具和配件的权利。对农业社区和维修行业来说，这是消费者权益的重大胜利，也推动了“维修权”运动的进一步发展。
items.summary_en: John Deere has reached a settlement with the Federal Trade Commission, granting farmers the right to repair their own equipment. Previously, the company's use of software locks and proprietary parts had made independent repairs difficult and costly. This agreement legally requires Deere to provide diagnostic tools, manuals, and parts to owners and independent repair shops. It's a major win for the right-to-repair movement, empowering farmers with more control over their machinery and reducing operational costs. The settlement sets a precedent, potentially pressuring other heavy equipment manufacturers to adopt similar policies.

items.title: GPT-5.6
items.author: logickkk1
items.summary_zh: 关于GPT-5.6的传闻在开发者社区悄然升温，据称这是OpenAI内部测试的新一代模型，在推理效率和长文本处理上有显著提升。尽管官方未确认，但泄露的基准测试显示其在复杂编程和数学任务上超越了现有版本。如果属实，这将意味着AI模型在实用性和响应速度上迈入新台阶，对依赖语言模型的开发者和企业影响深远。
items.summary_en: Rumors about GPT-5.6, an alleged internal iteration from OpenAI, have sparked excitement in the developer community. Leaked benchmarks suggest it offers substantial improvements in reasoning efficiency and long-context handling, outperforming current models on complex coding and math tasks. While OpenAI hasn't confirmed the release, the speculation points to a possible leap in practical AI utility, making responses faster and more accurate. For developers and businesses relying on language models, even incremental upgrades can translate into better user experiences and lower latency. This potential release underscores the rapid pace of AI advancement.

items.title: EU Parliament greenlights Chat Control 1.0
items.author: rapnie
items.summary_zh: 欧盟议会通过了备受争议的Chat Control 1.0法案，要求数字平台扫描并报告涉及儿童性虐待材料的私密通信内容。这项立法引发了隐私与安全之间的激烈辩论，支持者认为它有助于保护儿童，而反对者警告这可能破坏端到端加密并开创大规模监控的先例。对于关注数字权利和隐私保护的群体来说，这是一个需要密切关注的发展。
items.summary_en: The European Parliament has approved the controversial Chat Control 1.0 regulation, requiring digital platforms to scan private communications for child sexual abuse material. The law sparks intense debate between child safety advocates and privacy defenders, who warn it undermines end-to-end encryption and sets a precedent for mass surveillance. Anyone concerned about digital rights and encryption should pay close attention to this development.

items.title: Chatto is now open source
items.author: speckx
items.summary_zh: Chatto宣布正式开源，这款轻量级的聊天工具现在允许开发者自由查看和修改其源代码。Chatto注重简洁和隐私，提供了端到端加密的即时通讯体验，适合那些希望自建聊天服务或深入学习加密通信原理的技术爱好者。开源后，社区可以贡献改进，加速功能迭代。
items.summary_en: Chatto has officially gone open source, allowing developers to freely inspect and modify its code. This lightweight chat application emphasizes simplicity and privacy, offering end-to-end encrypted messaging. It's ideal for tech enthusiasts who want to self-host a chat service or learn about encrypted communication. Open-sourcing invites community contributions, accelerating feature development.

items.title: Show HN: 18 Words
items.author: pompomsheep
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者展示了他的项目“18 Words”，这是一个限字数的写作挑战工具，鼓励用户用恰好18个词表达一个想法或故事。它本质是一个极简主义写作练习平台，帮助人们提炼语言、聚焦核心。对于作家、社交媒体用户或任何希望提升表达简洁度的人来说，这是一个有趣且富有创造性的工具。
items.summary_en: A developer has introduced '18 Words', a writing challenge tool that prompts users to express an idea or story in exactly eighteen words. It's a minimalist platform for practicing concise writing, helping people distill thoughts to their essence. Writers, social media users, or anyone looking to sharpen their brevity will find this a fun and creative exercise.

items.title: Chat Control 1.0 and 2.0 Explained
items.author: gasull
items.summary_zh: 一篇文章详细解释了EU的Chat Control 1.0和2.0提案，包括它们的目标、技术要求和争议点。1.0聚焦于扫描已知的儿童虐待材料，而2.0则要求对所有通信进行基于风险的筛查，引发了更广泛的隐私担忧。这篇解读文章为普通人理解这一复杂立法提供了清晰的指南，尤其是对于关心数字隐私和网络监管的用户。
items.summary_en: An article thoroughly explains the EU's Chat Control 1.0 and 2.0 proposals, covering their goals, technical requirements, and controversies. While 1.0 targets scanning known child abuse material, 2.0 mandates risk-based screening of all communications, raising broader privacy concerns. This breakdown serves as a clear guide for anyone trying to understand these complex regulations, especially users concerned about digital privacy and online surveillance.

items.title: OpenWrt One – Open Hardware Router
items.author: peter_d_sherman
items.summary_zh: OpenWrt 团队发布了其首款官方开源硬件路由器，名为 OpenWrt One。这款设备旨在为高级用户和开发者提供完全开放的控制权，从启动加载器到系统软件均可自由定制。它不仅适用于网络调试和实验，也为那些希望摆脱闭源固件束缚的用户打开了新大门。
items.summary_en: The OpenWrt project has unveiled its first official open hardware router, aptly named OpenWrt One. Designed for power users and developers, the device provides complete control from bootloader to system software, enabling deep customization and experimentation. It offers a compelling alternative to locked-down consumer routers, appealing to network enthusiasts, security researchers, and anyone who values full ownership of their networking hardware. This launch marks a milestone in open-source networking.

items.title: StreetComplete: Fixing OpenStreetMap, one tiny quest at a time
items.author: kls0e
items.summary_zh: StreetComplete 是一款通过微任务引导普通人参与改进 OpenStreetMap 的移动应用。它把地图数据修复分解成一个个简单有趣的小任务，比如确认一条路是否有名称、某个商店是否还在营业，用户只需在散步时顺手回答几个问题就能为开放地图贡献数据。这种方式大大降低了参与地图编辑的门槛，让非技术用户也能轻松成为地图贡献者，从而帮助 OpenStreetMap 保持最新和准确。
items.summary_en: StreetComplete is a mobile app that turns improving OpenStreetMap into bite-sized, fun quests for ordinary people. It breaks down map data fixes into simple tasks, such as confirming a street name or whether a shop is still open. Users can answer these questions while out for a walk, effortlessly contributing to the open map. This approach dramatically lowers the barrier to map editing, allowing non-technical users to become contributors and helping keep OpenStreetMap accurate and up-to-date.

items.title: CoMaps – FOSS Offline Maps
items.author: basilikum
items.summary_zh: CoMaps 是一款自由开源的离线地图应用，专注于隐私保护和离线使用场景。它允许用户下载地图数据后在完全没有网络连接的情况下查看路线和地点信息，所有数据都存储在本地，不依赖任何云端服务。对于经常在偏远地区旅行、担心隐私泄露或希望避免流量费用的用户来说，CoMaps 提供了一种安全可靠的地图解决方案。它的设计理念是让地图真正为用户所有，而不是被第三方追踪。
items.summary_en: CoMaps is a free and open-source offline maps application that prioritizes privacy and offline usage. It lets users download map data and then browse routes and locations without any internet connection, storing everything locally and relying on no cloud services. This makes it ideal for travelers in remote areas, privacy-conscious users, or anyone looking to avoid data charges. CoMaps embodies the principle that maps should be owned by the user, not tracked by third parties.

items.title: ExploreYC
items.description: Open-source API for Y Combinator & a16z company data
items.summary_zh: ExploreYC是一个开源API，提供了Y Combinator和a16z投资组合公司的结构化数据访问，包括公司名称、简介、融资轮次和创始团队信息。创业者、投资者和研究人员可以通过该API轻松获取这些顶级孵化器和风投的公开数据，用于市场分析、竞品研究或个人项目。开源特性使得任何人都可以部署或扩展这个数据服务。
items.summary_en: ExploreYC is an open-source API that provides structured access to data from Y Combinator and a16z portfolio companies, including company names, descriptions, funding rounds, and founder details. Entrepreneurs, investors, and researchers can easily retrieve this publicly available data for market analysis, competitive research, or personal projects. Its open-source nature allows anyone to deploy or extend the data service.

items.title: Auriko
items.description: Trading desk for LLM calls
items.summary_zh: Auriko是一个专为大模型调用设计的交易平台，它让开发者能够像交易股票一样买卖LLM的API调用配额。通过这个平台，你可以灵活地管理和优化模型调用成本，在高峰期买入更多调用次数，在低谷时出售多余配额。对于经常使用多个大模型API的团队来说，Auriko提供了一种全新的成本控制方式，让资源分配更加经济和高效。
items.summary_en: Auriko is a trading desk designed specifically for LLM API calls, allowing developers to buy and sell call quotas just like stocks. This platform enables flexible cost management and resource allocation—purchase more calls during peak demand and sell excess during lulls. For teams that rely on multiple large language models, Auriko offers a novel way to optimize spending and ensure efficient usage, making it a compelling tool for cost-conscious AI developers.

items.title: Timbal AI
items.description: Build AI agents, workflows, and apps in one stack
items.summary_zh: Timbal AI是一个全栈平台，让你用一套工具就能构建AI代理、工作流和应用程序。它整合了从模型选择到部署的整个流程，无需在多个服务之间切换。无论你是想搭建一个简单的问答机器人，还是一个复杂的自动化流程，Timbal都能提供统一的开发体验。对于追求效率和快速迭代的AI开发者来说，这个一站式解决方案大大降低了开发门槛和运维复杂度。
items.summary_en: Timbal AI is an all-in-one stack for building AI agents, workflows, and applications, consolidating everything from model selection to deployment in a single platform. You no longer need to juggle multiple services—just one environment to design, test, and ship your AI solutions. Whether you're creating a simple chatbot or a complex automation pipeline, Timbal streamlines the development process. It's a boon for developers who value speed and simplicity, reducing both the learning curve and operational overhead.

items.title: Badge
items.description: AI agents collect peer reviews to generate proof of work
items.summary_zh: Badge利用AI代理自动收集同行评审，生成可验证的工作证明，解决了远程协作和自由职业场景下的信任难题。它通过算法聚合多方评价形成可信的“工作证据”，让个人无需手动整理即可展示真实能力，尤其适合去中心化团队和零工经济平台。
items.summary_en: Badge is a platform that uses AI agents to automatically collect peer reviews and generate a verifiable proof of work. It solves the trust problem in remote and freelance work by creating a decentralized reputation system based on real feedback. The AI gathers reviews from colleagues, clients, and collaborators, then synthesizes them into a tamper-proof credential. This is especially valuable for freelancers needing to demonstrate their skills, and for platforms that want to reduce fraud. By automating the review collection process, Badge makes it easy to build a trustworthy professional profile without manual effort.

items.title: Katalyst
items.description: The AI agent that works your Salesforce Pipeline
items.summary_zh: Katalyst是一款嵌入Salesforce的AI代理，能够自动管理销售管道中的各项任务，包括更新客户信息、安排跟进和优先排序潜在客户。它显著减少了销售代表在繁琐操作上的时间，让他们更专注于实际销售工作，对于依赖Salesforce的团队来说能大幅提升效率。
items.summary_en: Katalyst is an AI agent that works directly within your Salesforce pipeline, automating routine tasks such as updating contact records, scheduling follow-ups, and prioritizing leads. Sales teams often spend hours on administrative chores, and Katalyst takes over those responsibilities so reps can focus on closing deals. It integrates seamlessly with Salesforce, meaning no extra learning curve. By streamlining pipeline management, Katalyst helps sales teams operate more efficiently and improve conversion rates. It's a practical tool for any organization using Salesforce that wants to boost productivity.

items.title: Scribble Network
items.description: The product that makes AI recommend your brand
items.summary_zh: Scribble Network是一款帮助品牌在AI推荐系统中获得更多曝光的产品，通过优化内容和数据结构让AI算法更容易识别和推荐你的商品或服务。随着越来越多用户依赖AI进行选购决策，这项工作变得至关重要，尤其适合希望在智能搜索和推荐引擎中脱颖而出的商家。
items.summary_en: Scribble Network is a product designed to make your brand more visible to AI recommendation systems. As AI-powered search and product recommendations become the primary way people discover brands, many businesses find themselves invisible to these algorithms. Scribble Network optimizes your brand's content and data structure so that AI systems can easily find, understand, and recommend it. This is crucial for e-commerce sites, marketers, and any business that wants to be discovered through AI-driven channels. By aligning with how AI thinks, Scribble Network helps brands get seen when it matters most.

items.title: IvyForms
items.description: A WordPress form builder for real workflows
items.summary_zh: IvyForms是一款专为WordPress打造的表单构建插件，但它的目标远不止简单的联系表单。它着眼于真实的工作流程，比如审批流程、动态数据联动、条件逻辑等功能，让非技术人员也能构建复杂的业务表单。对于需要将表单与后台管理深度集成的WordPress站点来说，IvyForms能显著提升效率，减少对开发者的依赖。
items.summary_en: IvyForms is a WordPress form builder that goes beyond simple contact forms to handle real workflows. It supports approval processes, dynamic data linking, conditional logic, and more, enabling non-developers to build complex business forms. For WordPress sites that need deep integration between forms and backend management, IvyForms boosts efficiency and reduces reliance on developers.

items.title: Dupely
items.description: The trust layer for online shopping
items.summary_zh: Dupely为在线购物提供了一个信任层，通过验证卖家身份、商品真伪和交易记录来帮助消费者做出更安全的购买决策。在假货和欺诈盛行的电商环境中，它充当了中立担保的角色，让买卖双方都能更放心，尤其适合经常网购的消费者和希望建立信誉的小商户。
items.summary_en: Dupely creates a trust layer for online shopping by verifying sellers, authenticating products, and securing transactions. With the rise of e-commerce fraud and counterfeit goods, buyers often struggle to know whom to trust. Dupely acts as an independent verifier, providing badges, reviews, and guarantees that reduce risk. For sellers, it helps build credibility and attract more customers. The service integrates with major shopping platforms, making it easy for shoppers to see at a glance whether a store or product is trustworthy. Dupely is a valuable tool for anyone who wants a safer, more transparent online shopping experience.

items.title: Willow Frontier Pro
items.description: The fastest, most accurate dictation model in the world
items.summary_zh: Willow Frontier Pro自称是全世界最快且最准确的听写模型，专为实时语音转文字场景设计。它利用先进的深度学习架构，在嘈杂环境下也能保持高准确率，延迟极低。对于需要快速记录会议、采访或口述笔记的专业人士来说，这款工具能极大提升工作效率，甚至可能改变人们输入文字的方式。
items.summary_en: Willow Frontier Pro claims to be the world's fastest and most accurate dictation model, built for real-time speech-to-text. Thanks to its advanced deep learning architecture, it maintains high accuracy even in noisy environments with extremely low latency. For professionals needing quick transcription of meetings, interviews, or voice notes, this tool can dramatically boost productivity and potentially change how we input text.

items.title: Perfai Security
items.description: Find & fix live vulnerabilities in Vibe Apps with 1-prompt.
items.summary_zh: Perfai Security专门针对“Vibe Apps”这类快速开发的应用程序，提供一键发现并修复实时漏洞的能力。你只需输入一个提示，它就能扫描应用中的安全弱点并给出修复建议。对于使用低代码或快速迭代方式构建应用的团队来说，Perfai填补了安全审查的空缺，让开发者在保持开发速度的同时，不必担心安全问题。它特别适合那些缺乏专职安全团队的小型创业公司。
items.summary_en: Perfai Security is tailor-made for 'Vibe Apps'—rapidly developed applications—offering a one-prompt solution to find and fix live vulnerabilities. Just input a prompt, and it scans your app for security weaknesses while suggesting fixes. For teams building with low-code or fast iteration, Perfai bridges the gap in security review, allowing developers to maintain speed without compromising safety. It's especially valuable for startups that lack dedicated security personnel, providing an easy way to keep their apps secure.

items.title: 小程序上线半年我赚了多少钱？
items.description: 1. 开发历程 时间过得真快，转眼间福猪记账小程序上线已经有半年时间了，从v1.0.0 版本做到了 v1.6.1 版本。今天整理了开发日志，真的不敢相信自己在工作之余能够把它做出来并上线。 2.用户积
items.summary_zh: 一位独立开发者分享了他业余开发的记账小程序“福猪记账”上线半年来的真实收入与运营数据。从v1.0.0迭代到v1.6.1，他记录了开发日志、用户增长曲线和盈利情况。这篇文章不仅展示了个人开发者利用业余时间做产品的可能性，也提供了从零到一、从技术到商业的完整复盘，特别适合想试试副业的程序员参考。
items.summary_en: An indie developer shared the real revenue and operational data of his expense tracking mini-program called 'Fuzhu' over six months since launch. He iterated from v1.0.0 to v1.6.1, documenting development logs, user growth, and profitability. This article demonstrates the possibility of building a product in spare time, offering a complete postmortem from coding to business. It’s especially useful for programmers exploring side projects.

items.title: Cursor 转 Codex 大半个月，聊聊我的真实感受
items.description: Cursor 让我第一次强烈感受到 AI 编程的震撼，Codex 则让我第一次真正感觉到，AI 不只是编程助手，而是一个真正的超级Agent，Codex 明显更接近下一阶段的形态。
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者从Cursor切换到Amazon Codex使用了半个多月，分享了两者的本质差异。Cursor让他第一次感受到AI编程的震撼，但Codex让他真正觉得AI不再只是辅助工具，而是一个能独立执行任务的超级Agent。作者认为Codex更接近下一阶段AI编程的形态，从对话式补全进化到主动式代理，对追求最前沿编程体验的开发者有重要参考价值。
items.summary_en: After switching from Cursor to Amazon Codex for over half a month, a developer shared their real experience of the fundamental differences. While Cursor first impressed them with AI-assisted coding, Codex felt like a true super agent that can independently execute tasks, not just an assistant. The author believes Codex represents the next phase of AI programming—evolving from conversational completion to proactive agency. This comparison is invaluable for developers seeking the cutting edge in AI-powered coding tools.

items.title: 写给年轻程序员的几点建议-2
items.description: 现在互联网红利已经消失了，深知年轻程序员的不易，下面就浅薄地谈几点建议。中国人口基数比较大，要培养自己的 商业嗅觉。你能卖爆一个商品，就能获得巨大的财富。微信公众号如果能写出 几万 浏览量的文章，就有
items.summary_zh: 作者针对互联网红利消退的现状，向年轻程序员提出培养商业嗅觉和写作能力的建议。他认为在中国庞大的人口基数下，能卖爆一个商品或写出高阅读量的公众号文章就能获得巨大财富。文章强调技术之外的市场认知和内容表达能力同样重要，适合处于职业早期的程序员思考如何拓宽收入来源。
items.summary_en: The author offers advice for young programmers in the post-internet-bonus era, emphasizing the need to develop business acumen and writing skills. Given China's huge population, successfully selling a product or writing a viral WeChat article can bring significant wealth. The article argues that market insight and content communication are as crucial as technical skills, making it relevant for early-career programmers looking to diversify their income streams.

items.title: 最近公司烧token比招员工还贵，老板干懵了...
items.description: 如题。 这真的没在开玩笑。 这也是最近不少公司，在大力、甚至全面拥抱 AI 之后所发出的切实吐槽。 一个月前，Uber 的 CTO 曾对外透露，公司自部署 CC 以来，内部有超 9 成的工程师在高频率
items.summary_zh: 这不是段子，是真实发生在许多公司里的窘境。随着全面拥抱AI，员工高频调用大模型API，公司的token消耗费用竟然超过了招聘新员工的成本。Uber的CTO曾透露，内部有超过九成的工程师在频繁使用AI服务。老板们面对账单直呼头疼：本来是降本增效的AI，怎么成了新的烧钱黑洞？
items.summary_en: This isn't a joke—it's a real dilemma many companies are facing. After wholeheartedly adopting AI, their token usage costs have actually surpassed the expense of hiring new employees. Uber's CTO revealed that over 90% of their engineers are using AI services heavily. Bosses are staring at the bills in shock: the technology that was supposed to reduce costs and boost efficiency has instead become a new money-burning black hole.

items.title: 凌晨睡不着，我给台风巴威写了个追踪网站
items.description: 索性爬起来，打开电脑，用 Claude Fable 5 把想法一点点敲了出来。把基于中央气象台、日本气象厅、美国 JTWC、台湾气象署四家的路径数据放在同一张地图上之后，很多事一眼就看明白了
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者凌晨失眠，索性用Claude Fable 5快速搭建了一个台风巴威的追踪网站。他将中央气象台、日本气象厅、美国联合台风警报中心和台湾气象署四家的路径数据整合到同一张地图上，让不同预报机构的差异一目了然。这个项目展示了AI辅助编程的潜力，也体现了数据聚合在气象科普中的价值。
items.summary_en: An insomniac developer built a typhoon tracking website for Typhoon Bavi using Claude Fable 5 in the early hours. He aggregated path data from four weather agencies—China's Central Meteorological Observatory, Japan Meteorological Agency, US Joint Typhoon Warning Center, and Taiwan's Central Weather Bureau—onto a single map, making discrepancies instantly visible. This project demonstrates AI-assisted programming's potential and the value of data aggregation in weather education.

items.title: 面试官：“你连Claude Code都没用过吗？”，我怼回去：“就没用过又怎么了？”
items.description: 现在提起AI编程工具，Claude Code绝对是大家心目中的首选。甚至在面试当中，一句“你有没有用过Claude Code？”，已然成为衡量你技术敏感度的‘试金石’。！今天给大家分享下它的实战玩法！
items.summary_zh: 文章以面试中被问及Claude Code使用经历的场景为引子，作者起初对面试官的质疑表示不满，但随后分享了自己实际使用Claude Code的实战玩法。文中详细介绍了Claude Code在代码生成、调试和重构中的高效表现，强调了掌握AI编程工具正在成为技术敏感度的新标尺。对于求职者和开发者而言，这不仅是工具推荐，更是职业发展的提醒。
items.summary_en: The article starts with a job interview where the candidate is asked about Claude Code experience, initially feeling defensive. But then the author shares practical tips on using Claude Code for code generation, debugging, and refactoring, highlighting how proficiency in AI coding tools is becoming a benchmark for technical savvy. For job seekers and developers, it's not just a tool recommendation but a wake-up call for career growth.

items.title: 我用 Codex 重写了同事维护三年的代码，他没说谢谢——而是找了领导
items.description: 我用 Codex 花一个周末重写了同事维护三年的代码，提了一个大 PR。他没有说谢谢，而是找了领导。这篇文章复盘了我在 AI 时代犯的一个典型错误：技术上正确不等于做法正确。
items.summary_zh: 作者用OpenAI的Codex花一个周末重写了同事维护三年的代码，提了个大PR，结果同事没有感谢，反而直接去找了领导。这篇文章反思了在AI时代一个典型错误：技术上正确不等于做法正确。它提醒我们，在团队协作中，技术决策不仅要考虑效率，更要尊重他人劳动和历史积累，避免因技术优越感伤害人际关系。对于技术管理者或开发者而言，这不仅是代码重写的问题，更是关于如何平衡创新与团队协作的深刻教训。
items.summary_en: The author used OpenAI's Codex to rewrite a colleague's three-year-old codebase in a single weekend and submitted a massive pull request. Instead of gratitude, the colleague reported the matter to their manager. This piece reflects on a typical mistake in the AI era: being technically right doesn't mean being procedurally right. It underscores the importance of respecting team dynamics and historical contributions, even when wielding powerful new tools. The story is a cautionary tale for developers and tech leads about the delicate balance between innovation and collaboration, showing how technical superiority can backfire if not handled with empathy and communication.

items.title: 前端没有死，只是换了个姿势年薪百万
items.description: 前端没有死，只是换了个姿势年薪百万 一、一组让前端人坐不住的数据 先看三组数据。 第一组：传统前端岗位在萎缩。 拉勾网《2026年Q1互联网前端人才就业报告》显示，国内0-3年初级前端岗位招聘量同比暴
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章分析了前端行业的真实就业趋势：传统初级岗位招聘量确实在萎缩，但高级前端岗位的需求却逆势增长，年薪百万并非天方夜谭。作者认为前端领域并没有“死”，而是正在经历转型——从单纯做页面展示转向全栈化、工程化、甚至AI集成。对于想突破瓶颈的前端开发者来说，关键是提升架构能力和跨领域知识。
items.summary_en: This article analyzes the real employment trends in frontend development: while junior positions are indeed shrinking, demand for senior roles is rising sharply, with six-figure salaries becoming attainable. The author argues that frontend is not dying but transforming—from simple page rendering to full-stack, engineering, and even AI integration. For developers looking to break through the ceiling, the key is to strengthen architectural skills and cross-domain knowledge.

items.title: 🚀 2026 年 6 月 GitHub 十大热门项目排行榜 🔥
items.description: 欢迎来到 2026 年 6 月 GitHub 热门开源项目排行榜！聚焦 Agent 感知 + 技能市场 + 视频生产 + 代码智能 + 并行编排五大主线！
items.summary_zh: 文章盘点了2026年6月GitHub上最热门的十大开源项目，聚焦五大技术主线：Agent感知、技能市场、视频生产、代码智能和并行编排。这些项目反映了当前AI和开发者工具领域的最新趋势，例如自主智能体框架、去中心化技能交易平台、AI视频生成工具、代码补全与审查增强插件，以及并行计算调度方案。对于希望紧跟开源前沿的开发者，这篇榜单提供了一份值得关注的项目清单。
items.summary_en: This article highlights the top ten trending open source projects on GitHub in June 2026, organized around five key themes: agent perception, skill marketplaces, video production, code intelligence, and parallel orchestration. The projects showcase cutting-edge developments in AI agents, decentralized skill trading platforms, AI-powered video generation, smart code completion and review tools, and high-performance parallel scheduling frameworks. For developers who want to stay ahead of the open source curve, this curated list offers a valuable snapshot of where the ecosystem is heading.

items.title: 字节二面：1000瓶酒，有一瓶是毒药，多少只老鼠可以查出来？
items.description: 1000瓶酒里混了一瓶毒药，用老鼠试毒，老鼠在喝完毒酒1小时后死亡，问最少几只老鼠能找出来？大多数人卡在这道题上，是因为陷入了“流水线思维”——总想着让老鼠一只接一只地去试，或者用老鼠的命去填。
items.summary_zh: 这是一道经典的老鼠试毒智力题：1000瓶酒中只有一瓶有毒，老鼠喝下毒酒后一小时内死亡，问最少需要多少只老鼠才能找出毒酒？大多数人被困在“一只一只试”的线性思维里，实际上用二进制编码的思路，每只老鼠代表一个二进制位，通过组合测试，仅需10只老鼠就能在1小时内锁定毒酒。这道题考察的是将问题转化为二进制编码的能力，常用于面试中测试候选人的逻辑思维和算法素养。
items.summary_en: This is a classic logic puzzle: among 1000 bottles of wine, exactly one is poisoned; a mouse dies within one hour after drinking the poison. What's the minimum number of mice needed to identify the poisoned bottle? Many people fall into the trap of linear testing, but the trick is to use binary encoding—each mouse represents a binary digit, and by combining tests, just 10 mice can pinpoint the poison within an hour. The problem tests your ability to reframe a problem in terms of binary representation, making it a favorite in tech interviews to evaluate logical thinking and algorithmic ingenuity.

items.title: 为什么腾讯几乎没有人工客服？
items.summary_zh: 腾讯几乎没有人工客服，背后有多重原因：首先，腾讯拥有海量用户，完全依赖人工客服成本高得难以承受；其次，腾讯的产品线极其庞杂，从社交到游戏再到支付，客服需要掌握的知识面太广，培训难度大；再者，腾讯在智能客服和自动化处理上投入巨大，通过AI和自助工具解决绝大多数常见问题，而将少数复杂问题留给人工处理。这种做法在互联网巨头中并不罕见，虽然用户体验上常遭诟病，但从商业效率角度看却是合理选择。
items.summary_en: Why does Tencent barely have human customer service? There are several reasons: first, with a massive user base, relying solely on human agents would be prohibitively expensive; second, Tencent's product line—from social media and games to payments—is incredibly diverse, making it hard to train agents on everything; third, Tencent has heavily invested in AI-powered and automated solutions to handle the vast majority of common issues, leaving only the most complex ones to humans. While this approach often frustrates users, it's a pragmatic business decision common among tech giants, prioritizing efficiency over personal touch.

items.title: 2026 EWC 饿狼传说项目曾卓君爆冷不敌 naiwang 首轮出局，如何评价本场比赛？
items.summary_zh: 在2026年电竞世界杯的《饿狼传说》项目中，中国格斗游戏传奇选手曾卓君（小孩）意外首轮输给了名不见经传的naiwang，爆冷出局。这场比赛引发了社区热烈讨论，有人认为这是小孩状态下滑的信号，也有人归因于新版角色平衡性调整带来的不确定性。这场失利不仅打破了小孩在格斗赛事中的统治神话，也让人们重新审视《饿狼传说》项目的竞技格局——新人的崛起和老将的适应力成为焦点。对于格斗游戏爱好者和电竞观众来说，这是一场充满戏剧性和启示意义的对决，提醒人们电竞世界里没有永远的冠军。
items.summary_en: At the 2026 Esports World Cup, legendary Chinese fighting game player Zeng Zhuojun, known as 'Xiaohai', suffered a shocking first-round defeat against the relatively unknown player naiwang in the Fatal Fury tournament. This upset has ignited heated discussions in the fighting game community, with some attributing it to Xiaohai's declining form and others pointing to balance changes in the new version that disrupt established strategies. The loss not only breaks Xiaohai's long-standing dominance but also reshapes the competitive landscape of Fatal Fury, highlighting the rise of newcomers and the challenges veterans face in adapting. For esports enthusiasts and fighting game fans, this match serves as a dramatic reminder that no champion is invincible in the ever-evolving world of competitive gaming.

items.title: 如何从零开始开发一款独立游戏？
items.summary_zh: 这是一份面向零基础爱好者的独立游戏开发指南，覆盖从概念构思、选择引擎（如Unity或Godot）、学习编程基础、制作美术和音效，到发布上线的全流程。文章强调，关键在于从小项目起步、利用现成素材和社区资源，而不是追求完美原型。它解决了新手最迷茫的“从哪里开始”问题，并提供了时间管理和避免“磨洋工”的实用建议。对于想要将游戏创意变为现实、但缺乏技术背景的独立开发者和学生来说，这份指南像一张清晰的地图，帮助他们绕过常见的坑，快速产出可玩的MVP。
items.summary_en: This is a comprehensive guide for beginners who want to develop an indie game from absolute scratch. It covers the entire journey, from concept brainstorming and choosing a game engine like Unity or Godot, to learning basic programming, creating art assets and sound effects, and finally publishing the game. The key insight is that aspiring developers should start with tiny projects, leverage free assets and community tutorials, and avoid the trap of perfectionism. The guide solves the biggest dilemma for newcomers: 'where do I even begin?' It also offers practical advice on time management and staying motivated to finish rather than endlessly polishing. For indie developers and students with little to no coding background, this serves as a clear roadmap to turn their game ideas into a playable MVP quickly and efficiently.

items.title: 你愿意把自己的个人记忆和故事，交给 AI 做成一个永久的数字档案吗？
items.summary_zh: 这个问题探讨了一项新兴技术：利用AI将个人记忆、故事甚至情感经历转化为永久数字档案。支持者认为，这能帮助我们对抗遗忘、为后代留下鲜活的人生记录，甚至能通过对话形式与“数字自我”互动。但争议同样尖锐：隐私泄露风险、记忆被AI扭曲的可能性，以及这种“数字化永生”是否会削弱人类自然记忆的情感价值。文章没有给出标准答案，而是引导读者思考：当AI可以完美复刻你的回忆时，你还会珍惜真实的过去吗？对于关注科技伦理、个人隐私和数字遗产的人来说，这是一个值得深思的命题。
items.summary_en: This discussion explores the provocative idea of using AI to transform personal memories and stories into a permanent digital archive that could outlive the individual. Proponents argue it helps combat forgetfulness, preserves rich life narratives for future generations, and even allows interactive conversations with a digital 'self.' However, sharp concerns arise over privacy breaches, the risk of AI distorting memories, and whether a digital copy might devalue the emotional authenticity of natural recollection. The article doesn't offer a definitive answer but invites readers to reflect: if AI can perfectly replicate your memories, would you still cherish the imperfect, organic past? For anyone interested in tech ethics, privacy, and digital legacy, this subject raises profound questions about identity and mortality.
